description: Goal: compiler2 type/spec/extern fragments have one authoritative transport: preserved token payloads. Signal: frontdoor emits token payloads for compiler2 fragment islands; surface/function readers consume them directly; compiler2 no longer reconstructs type tokens from quoted AST or re-lexes string fragments on its own path. Strategy: audit every compiler2 type/spec/extern fragment entry point, move them onto token_payload end-to-end, delete AST->token reconstruction helpers once the readers no longer need them, and prove the old re-lex telemetry stays absent after the quoted-expander/publication split lands.
title: Compiler2 type fragments: standardize on token-payload transport and delete quoted re-rendering
